3827759.label: PL2400_vo_DUO_rescue2_B
3827759.transcript: They won't be so lucky next time.

4431268.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1400
4431268.transcript: Uh-huh. Wherever we tread, the scent of blood follows.

6238313.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
6238313.transcript: Star Sword Sovereign, I demand a deathmatch!

17769751.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2700
17769751.transcript: You got it! Using my indoor voice for the sniper!

17864026.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_C
17864026.transcript: Back to bed with your big guy.

19445347.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600
19445347.transcript: What a coincidence! I was just thinking the same thing!

21935322.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_B
21935322.transcript: That can't be all I've got!

26018147.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0600
26018147.transcript: Nothing to it. I said I'd pull my weight, and I always keep my word.

26564497.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
26564497.transcript: My blood sings with the thrill of battle!

31253969.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
31253969.transcript: Thought the Alpha Wolf could not with a pack, did ya?

43004653.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
43004653.transcript: Yes, the fun never stops, does it?

43667513.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_A
43667513.transcript: Don't throw in the towel on me, Sword Veil!

52548995.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
52548995.transcript: Show me you ain't afraid of death!

57723823.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
57723823.transcript: I've heard you turn into a dragon. That true, or a...

58434642.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0700
58434642.transcript: Back, boy! It's far too dangerous on the front lines!

58538380.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
58538380.transcript: Aha! Good work! Let's bring them the finale!

64019084.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
64019084.transcript: We are who we are. That's just how the world works.

65979750.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST
65979750.transcript: My hands are trembling! This... this has never happened before!

66292683.label: PL2400_vo_CMM_emo_win_4
66292683.transcript: All will be crushed beneath my spear!

67180086.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
67180086.transcript: Make way, little piss-heads! Hurricane Gallanza coming through!

77145316.label: PL2400_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_A
77145316.transcript: Then let's see what they're made of!

77942726.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
77942726.transcript: Ever wanted to fly? I'll show you what it's like!

80963946.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
80963946.transcript: Nice! NICE! I think you meant impeccable!

81212604.label: PL2400_vo_DUO_rescue1_B_PL2500_2
81212604.transcript: Whoa-ho-ho! Don't see a show like that every day!

84113023.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
84113023.transcript: One day I'll get you in a death match, Astral. Mark my words.

84446346.label: PL2400_vo_ETC_quest_clear_4
84446346.transcript: I live for the sport and nothing else!

85756374.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
85756374.transcript: Something tells me you would take me to school instead.

86473801.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0600
86473801.transcript: Makes it easy to pluck out all the weeds in one go.

87031894.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
87031894.transcript: This mountain of bricks is coming down now!

89177244.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
89177244.transcript: Face me, Black Dragon! I demand a deathmatch!

90497230.label: PL2400_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_1
90497230.transcript: Bit off more than you could chew, huh?

103239320.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0200
103239320.transcript: Haha, as expected of young Leer's guardian.

104759373.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
104759373.transcript: Wrong. All wrong. I have seniority.

107979849.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
107979849.transcript: Tweyen of the Eternals, I challenge you!

120756674.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0400
120756674.transcript: Well done, child! You can join me for the next attack!

122021082.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
122021082.transcript: It's easy. Give it a sprint like crazy, then whoop, and you're off.

127291974.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1400
127291974.transcript: Sharp instincts. I can appreciate that.

127787571.label: PL2400_vo_ATK_ability_9_3
127787571.transcript: Behold, the fangs of the Silver Wolves!

132479554.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2800
132479554.transcript: Says the woman with the cutthroat look in her eyes.

134966353.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2700
134966353.transcript: Sure I do. I just like my way better.

137154929.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0500
137154929.transcript: Ha ha! Blasted right through him!

138303619.label: PL2400_vo_NAV_throw_spear_reaction_1
138303619.transcript: Let me show you how it's done!

138372628.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
138372628.transcript: That was nothing. I go beyond deadly.

140731512.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
140731512.transcript: Yes! Now you've got me fired up!

143437028.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
143437028.transcript: Strange, though. Did something drive it mad?

143750786.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
143750786.transcript: Good! We were in perfect sync!

144176292.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
144176292.transcript: I'm even better now! I've left that version of me in the dust!

151749918.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
151749918.transcript: Enter my territory and you get cut down!

152269242.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0300
152269242.transcript: Nice shot. What do you say to a death match?

152993988.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
152993988.transcript: Huh! Gotta keep pace with the mighty Eternals!

153729882.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
153729882.transcript: So, after we're done here, deathmatch?

159829039.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0400
159829039.transcript: Quick, child! To the back lines!

164626583.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_B
164626583.transcript: Id! Reject the dragon, or it'll consume you!

165279666.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0000
165279666.transcript: From a tremor like that? Weak!

165433186.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
165433186.transcript: Would you mind a deathmatch? I'm ready anytime!

166321184.label: PL2400_vo_ETC_lockon_3
166321184.transcript: The Silverwolf Alpha has found his prey!

172026270.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1600
172026270.transcript: I expect more results like that!

173023627.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
173023627.transcript: When Galanza meets Galanza, Gal Galanza Anza!

176290157.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
176290157.transcript: And that was the Gallanza Especial!

179977863.label: PL2400_vo_ATK_ability_4_3_b
179977863.transcript: Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha!

185827461.label: PL2400_vo_ETC_lockon_5
185827461.transcript: And here I was itching to go all out.

190070469.label: PL2400_vo_CMM_emo_squat_1
190070469.transcript: Six reps. One, two, three, four, five, six.

191870949.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
191870949.transcript: More! I've yet to have my fill!

198630031.label: PL2400_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_PL2500_3
198630031.transcript: Still not safe, still not sorry.

199214899.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
199214899.transcript: Huh. It seems someone's compensating for their size with strength.

200018900.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_C
200018900.transcript: Come on! Give me a real fight!

206656423.label: PL2400_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL1900_1
206656423.transcript: Come on, Id! That ain't enough to kill ya!

209604110.label: PL2400_vo_ETC_quest_clear_5
209604110.transcript: Bring me a real challenge! That's an order!

212117767.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_1_FIRST
212117767.transcript: Monster vs. Wolf! A battle for the ages!

219080602.label: PL2400_vo_ETC_quest_clear_6
219080602.transcript: Nya ha ha ha ha ha! Ha!

220389320.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
220389320.transcript: The way you fight! So brutal! I love it!

221124525.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
221124525.transcript: You've got soul, swordsman. I respect that.

222338605.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
222338605.transcript: Watch it, smug mouth! I could snap you like a twig!

223269832.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
223269832.transcript: Oh, pass some of that burning spirit my way!

231295884.label: PL2400_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_1
231295884.transcript: Let's begin! One, two, three, four! Piece of cake!

232148976.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
232148976.transcript: Oh, if only I could fight all the Eternals to the death.

236176489.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
236176489.transcript: Ha ha ha ha! Don't just stand there, Supreme Primarch!

237415230.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
237415230.transcript: I wasn't headed to the monastery. Yep, flew right past it.

241360678.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
241360678.transcript: All that matters is the last team standing.

244982931.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0000
244982931.transcript: You wanted power, you got power!

245161156.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
245161156.transcript: We've battles left to fight, Commander!

246659180.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_FIRST
246659180.transcript: My gut's telling me you ain't strong enough to win. Not yet.

247567820.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A
247567820.transcript: You're a grade-A pain in the ass, you know that?

249751024.label: PL2400_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL1900_2
249751024.transcript: Hey, pick on someone your own size. Me!

251083976.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
251083976.transcript: Really was a thing of beauty, wasn't it?

252601468.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2800
252601468.transcript: Never would have guessed you packed so much punch!

253233593.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
253233593.transcript: Don't copy my move name! That's mine!

257411797.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
257411797.transcript: Your tiny specters work well together.

262387538.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0200
262387538.transcript: Tell me, how do you fight with such a flimsy blade?

268068812.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
268068812.transcript: That scent, some kind of rose oil?

270709004.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
270709004.transcript: And to test my middle in a deathmatch, please?

277837278.label: PL2400_vo_CMM_emo_pose_1
277837278.transcript: Can you keep up with this?

283276874.label: PL2400_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_3
283276874.transcript: Get in my belly! Just like Ma's cooking.

291864013.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_C
291864013.transcript: A shame we have to end this fight.

291981712.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_2
291981712.transcript: Oh, that was some good fun!

295241142.label: PL2400_vo_MOV_wait_cold_5
295241142.transcript: What the hell are you waiting for?

295401593.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
295401593.transcript: Look at the time. Didn't we schedule a death match now?

296134996.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
296134996.transcript: I'll punch straight through your front line!

303010919.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
303010919.transcript: Ha ha ha ha! Get wrecked, shrimps!

304815484.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
304815484.transcript: Ha! My growth isn't static, it's electric!

305189432.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A
305189432.transcript: Your worthless ambitions end here, Lilith!

306640872.label: PL2400_vo_ETC_quest_start_3
306640872.transcript: Make way for the one and only, Gallanza!

313926746.label: PL2400_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_C
313926746.transcript: Eyes on the enemy! Here they come!

316759814.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
316759814.transcript: You people are like fight magnets, and I'm all for it!

317935693.label: PL2400_vo_CMM_emo_win_3
317935693.transcript: Leave it to good old Gallanza.

324569304.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
324569304.transcript: Ain't the time or place to go soft now!

328981906.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600
328981906.transcript: Thought she was tap dancing on their heads, but those were solid hits.

337052637.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
337052637.transcript: Clearly, two powerhouses are better than one.

347690834.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
347690834.transcript: Well, you kept up with me.

348178407.label: PL2400_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL2500_1
348178407.transcript: They got you good, Sword Veil!

350341092.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
350341092.transcript: I never get bored when you're around.

352035343.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
352035343.transcript: Oh-ho! That one-two punch wasn't half bad!

361315424.label: PL2400_vo_CMM_emo_win_5
361315424.transcript: Bring your fiercest! I love the fight!

368903327.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_A
368903327.transcript: Ain't nothing to do but keep moving.

372964636.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
372964636.transcript: I get the feeling there's more to your power.

373305080.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1300
373305080.transcript: Hey, old-timer! Snap out of it! You wanna sleep? You do it after the fight!

374162295.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
374162295.transcript: Yeah, yeah. Let's just get back to the fight.

375251870.label: PL2400_vo_ETC_lockon_2
375251870.transcript: I could go for some entertainment!

377857719.label: PL2400_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_PL1900_3
377857719.transcript: Greatness starts from the ground up!

387168309.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_B
387168309.transcript: Burn bright till the bitter end!

394130296.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0900
394130296.transcript: Yes, yes! Follow me into the fray!

397727091.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
397727091.transcript: Out of the way, fresh meat!

397816109.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
397816109.transcript: Ah, to hell with the details! I'm gonna smash it!

403440566.label: PL2400_vo_SP_charge_name_3
403440566.transcript: Live for the sport and die by the spear!

403729160.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
403729160.transcript: And you wrapped our foes with a great big bow!

412792976.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
412792976.transcript: You're a damn stubborn one, Ed!

417790544.label: PL2400_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_2
417790544.transcript: Let's do it! That's enough for now.

436733591.label: PL2400_vo_CMM_emo_pose_2
436733591.transcript: I AM THE SILVER WOLF! MY SKILL IS UNMATCHED!

438291426.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_A
438291426.transcript: Double the Gallanza, double the fun!

444204965.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0300
444204965.transcript: Haha! I'm the strongest man alive!

446241565.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
446241565.transcript: As long as I get to keep smashing our foes, call me whatever you want.

451754380.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
451754380.transcript: Yeah, keep smirking. You're just jealous of my moves.

452637080.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
452637080.transcript: I'd have to be blind to miss a target that wide open!

459700632.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
459700632.transcript: Who is this old man? His speed is unnatural. Lethal.

459823836.label: PL2400_vo_ATK_turn_up_1
459823836.transcript: Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha!

459926103.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
459926103.transcript: Nah, I barely lifted a finger. Your swordplay deserves the credit.

461815108.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0600
461815108.transcript: Exposing their weakness with thorns. Nice technique.

473585299.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
473585299.transcript: Wait, at least put my name in the attack too!

475410598.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
475410598.transcript: I'll show you exhausted! Next one's for real!

483591264.label: PL2400_vo_SP_charge_name_2
483591264.transcript: Feel my steel between those bones!

486480182.label: PL2400_vo_DUO_buff_F_PL1900
486480182.transcript: Now that gets the blood pumping, Id!

486698323.label: PL2400_vo_CMM_emo_abs_1
486698323.transcript: One. Two. Three. Four. Five. Six.

492544243.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
492544243.transcript: I welcome all challengers, soulless husk or not.

493331237.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
493331237.transcript: Uh-huh! Have I finally caught the Lord's attention?

498477932.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
498477932.transcript: Haha! On to the next fool!

498935389.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0800
498935389.transcript: Ha ha ha ha! Can you keep up with the swiftness of my speed?

499130075.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
499130075.transcript: Once we finish off the weaklings, the final opponent is me!

505834170.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
505834170.transcript: The Eternal Rage style. I like it.

511205415.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2100
511205415.transcript: Supreme Primarch, I challenge you to a deathmatch!

524011569.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_B
524011569.transcript: I could play with this big old toy forever!

534372069.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_FIRST
534372069.transcript: Now this is what I came for!

539913510.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0000
539913510.transcript: Ha ha ha ha! I like your metal!

540620152.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1300
540620152.transcript: The next battle awaits, and I hunger for it!

547857338.label: PL2400_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_3
547857338.transcript: I'll pay him back in spades!

552751663.label: PL2400_vo_DUO_recovery_D_PL1900
552751663.transcript: You were always a smart one.

565214452.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
565214452.transcript: So, you see, the catalyst looks like, uh, um, looks like I've forgotten.

567770507.label: PL2400_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_B
567770507.transcript: Yes! Yes! Now this is a death match!

569773964.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1800
569773964.transcript: Drop the act and get serious!

581731487.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
581731487.transcript: Huh! We all know you can handle yourself just fine.

583283722.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_A
583283722.transcript: How'd you let yourself get cornered?

583612129.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0400
583612129.transcript: No thanks needed. Come on. Who's next?

589400594.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
589400594.transcript: I ain't footing the bill if we break this.

591813698.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0200
591813698.transcript: Honestly, I wish an opponent would blast me away sometimes.

602286323.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
602286323.transcript: Hmm. Forever pure, forever reckless. A brilliant mantra!

602823282.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
602823282.transcript: Mwahahahaha! It's all in the hips!

612655364.label: PL2400_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL1900_3
612655364.transcript: That's a scar to take home, Id.

614724386.label: PL2400_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_PL1900
614724386.transcript: The whelp's grown strong enough to help me!

614756240.label: PL2400_vo_ETC_box_check_l_3
614756240.transcript: Now this is the good stuff.

616914371.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
616914371.transcript: You still can't tell it's Austin?

618015301.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B
618015301.transcript: How much farther to the top?

621529867.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_C
621529867.transcript: Finally! The tower was a formidable opponent!

624623968.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1200
624623968.transcript: Only a thousand? Try a billion! Now we're talking!

636111182.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
636111182.transcript: Should have read that tech report better.

642966733.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
642966733.transcript: Why complicate the fight? Strength reigns supreme!

645677238.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
645677238.transcript: Bullets, spears, fists. It's all fair game to me.

648073425.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1800
648073425.transcript: What's wrong with that? The shortest path to victory is a straight line.

649248543.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
649248543.transcript: That's my style, and I'm sticking to it.

651498262.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
651498262.transcript: Come now! You're just as battle-tested as me!

652208432.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
652208432.transcript: Have a taste of our Link's Stravaganza Especial, honed to perfection!

658573810.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
658573810.transcript: That's the spirit! You're not the only one who has faith in his fists!

666135137.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
666135137.transcript: Come! Our rampage has only just begun!

667947231.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
667947231.transcript: Not a single one of them will make it past me!

669257779.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
669257779.transcript: Ha ha ha ha! You should be used to my power by now!

669820519.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
669820519.transcript: Ha! I've got plenty in the tank!

672232813.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2100
672232813.transcript: Really now? You'll introduce me to this challenger as soon as possible!

674086411.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
674086411.transcript: The strongest of the strongest! Remember that!

676576236.label: PL2400_vo_ATK_sp_turn_up_2
676576236.transcript: If you wanna win, you gotta spin!

678412486.label: PL2400_vo_CMM_emo_call_emergency_2
678412486.transcript: Come on, come on! Hold it!

678766405.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0000
678766405.transcript: Mwahahahaha! Couldn't have said it better!

684503271.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2900
684503271.transcript: Well, when you're a born warrior, what else is there?

690672604.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2500
690672604.transcript: Taste it! The Gallanza Link Especial!

697788740.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
697788740.transcript: Yet another trial on the path to true strength!

699673435.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0800
699673435.transcript: Oh, really? I'll take that as a challenge. And I accept!

707605768.label: PL2400_vo_ATK_turn_up_2
707605768.transcript: Go, go, go, go, go, go, go!

710117956.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
710117956.transcript: Ha ha ha ha! Ride the wave!

713085970.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_B
713085970.transcript: It must have felt that one.

713713481.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
713713481.transcript: I can't play now, pup. You could get hurt.

715104569.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1200
715104569.transcript: Glorious! You fight with a ferocity 1,000 times your stature!

717328783.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
717328783.transcript: Well, well. Little lady's got some talent.

720148280.label: PL2400_vo_CMM_emo_win_2
720148280.transcript: Back to boot camp with them, the Greenhorns!

722814971.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_A
722814971.transcript: You just don't get it, but I got all day to teach ya!

725780915.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_C
725780915.transcript: These rookies need another taste of boot camp.

727089232.label: PL2400_vo_DUO_rescue1_B_PL1900_2
727089232.transcript: Wild and reckless is my style.

730021376.label: PL2400_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_PL1900_2
730021376.transcript: Hey, where's the fun in that?

730325245.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
730325245.transcript: Don't be shy! Tear them limb from limb!

735359610.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
735359610.transcript: Thought I should slow down for my elders, but I see that was no concern at all.

737747675.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
737747675.transcript: Sure was. Already have new moves in mind for our next team up.

738929395.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
738929395.transcript: When you're elite, come second nature. Like breathing.

742204527.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0600
742204527.transcript: Are there none who can match my strength?

742226039.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2700
742226039.transcript: Working up a good sweat just means you're having fun.

745786213.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_C
745786213.transcript: Take me out! If you've got the nerve!

748234713.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
748234713.transcript: Please, let me witness such an event. I shudder in anticipation.

754253912.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
754253912.transcript: I respect a veteran who never misses his mark.

757471082.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_B
757471082.transcript: Hey, watch it! Don't step in whatever that is!

763026479.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_3chain_2
763026479.transcript: Oh, they're just too easy for us.

772829755.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0000
772829755.transcript: Oh, but I hope they still try.

776107293.label: PL2400_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_2
776107293.transcript: One more. That hits the spot.

778079931.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
778079931.transcript: This damn mess of a god, hiding in its sludge?

781853643.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
781853643.transcript: Not stop until you're beat bloody, huh? Fine by me!

785771502.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1100
785771502.transcript: Wolf and dragon! Never has there been a deadlier combination!

787284311.label: PL2400_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_PL2500
787284311.transcript: Didn't watch my back and I got knocked flat on it.

806203750.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1200
806203750.transcript: Stronger of will, stronger of might!

812269069.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
812269069.transcript: Ha! It doesn't matter how many swords you got, if you can't use them, right?

813764637.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
813764637.transcript: All right, Gallanza. You're climbing this tower.

816087045.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
816087045.transcript: Ha! There's no one I'd rather crack skulls with!

817191548.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1000
817191548.transcript: Fight me with all your flames!

832832456.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2600
832832456.transcript: What was that? Sounds like someone's hankering for a deathmatch!

834386895.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_2_FIRST
834386895.transcript: This mountain's only big enough for one alpha, and it ain't you!

834768861.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
834768861.transcript: Only one thing will satiate me. Proving I'm the strongest man in the skies!

836957624.label: PL2400_vo_CMM_emo_squat_3
836957624.transcript: No pain, no gain. Soy. Soya.

838338587.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
838338587.transcript: That word sends a shiver down my spine. Sweet? Really?

838846097.label: PL2400_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_C
838846097.transcript: Good. Then we meet at death's door.

839018559.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A
839018559.transcript: When the wind bites, you gotta bite back!

842384377.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
842384377.transcript: You've got nerve. I'll give you that.

845188875.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700
845188875.transcript: Eh, leave it to the guy with the actual spear.

846256306.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
846256306.transcript: You just spiked a bunch of enemies through the face!

846835289.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0500
846835289.transcript: Fire your gun! I want to see if my spear can fly faster than your bullets!

850958674.label: PL2400_vo_ATK_ability_4_2_b
850958674.transcript: Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha!

852497891.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
852497891.transcript: Maybe you want to eat more protein. Beef up that frame a bit.

857816431.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
857816431.transcript: Lord of Flames, let's have a deathmatch!

884330407.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
884330407.transcript: I like that confidence. Next time, we arm wrestle.

886886848.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
886886848.transcript: Spear Master of the Eternals, huh? Another challenger to add to my list.

889968046.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_A
889968046.transcript: Strike me down if you dare!

894202837.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2600
894202837.transcript: Get a move on! We have fights to fight!

896801546.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_3
896801546.transcript: Ha ha ha! You got that right!

900326294.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300
900326294.transcript: We beat them to a pulp!

902348011.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
902348011.transcript: Think you can handle this on your own, huh?

912037272.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_3_FIRST
912037272.transcript: Pup's gone mad, and its ice is even colder! My kind of fight!

912850936.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0700
912850936.transcript: Can't help it if enemies keep impaling themselves on my spear!

912956042.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1300
912956042.transcript: Damn! You fight like lightning, old man!

915666417.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_9st_1_FIRST
915666417.transcript: You may not be real, but this thrill, this passion for battle, can't be beat!

918293043.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
918293043.transcript: What's the matter? Things get too heated for you?

918717772.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
918717772.transcript: Their prey gets ripped to shreds.

920206450.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
920206450.transcript: That shot felt like pure luck, but you're not the betting type.

921405598.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100
921405598.transcript: Are you not having the time of your life?

936302766.label: PL2400_vo_CMM_emo_boxing_3
936302766.transcript: There! Gotcha! I'm gonna break ya!

947258466.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0700
947258466.transcript: Ghost or not, you stay out of danger.

949374153.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
949374153.transcript: Why keep the status quo? Let's push our limits!

951769730.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
951769730.transcript: That was a rice bowl? Why did it taste like dessert?

953509725.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0900
953509725.transcript: Vane, what say we kick things up a notch?

958770912.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
958770912.transcript: The passion for battle, it burns!

960271541.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
960271541.transcript: So you owe me one then. How about a deathmatch?

963274663.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
963274663.transcript: They call you the Dragon Slayer, but can you take down the Silver Wolf?

965306783.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
965306783.transcript: Id! Get your ass back over here!

967050277.label: PL2400_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL2500_2
967050277.transcript: Go have yourself a tea party.

979083506.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2100
979083506.transcript: Not half bad. Come on. What do you say to a death?

982941888.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1200
982941888.transcript: Yes, lass! You cut them down with brutal efficiency!

984020725.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500
984020725.transcript: Yes! Could go for a snack.

984167402.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
984167402.transcript: I know you're still in there!

984883924.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_fullchain
984883924.transcript: I ain't the strongest for nothing!

985880321.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
985880321.transcript: I'll blast through our next foe with all my strength!

986863884.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
986863884.transcript: Uh, I beg to differ. Your mouth says no, but your eyes say yes!

989895511.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
989895511.transcript: I'll let you rest easy soon.

1003801536.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1700
1003801536.transcript: Aha! Now you're speaking my language!

1005593251.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
1005593251.transcript: Yes, yes! Rebel in the battle!

1007360196.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
1007360196.transcript: Fine! I'll unleash a whole damn hurricane on this one!

1009498258.label: PL2400_vo_NAV_get_snp_2
1009498258.transcript: I'll forgive your cowardice, but just once!

1016575917.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
1016575917.transcript: Hmm, your technique reminds me of the Sword Veil.

1029298285.label: PL2400_vo_ETC_comeback_1
1029298285.transcript: This is no time for a nap.

1030200067.label: PL2400_vo_CMM_emo_pose_4
1030200067.transcript: Behold my spear! Mightiest of the mighty!

1039038816.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
1039038816.transcript: Come at me with everything you got!

1039262738.label: PL2400_vo_CMM_emo_abs_3
1039262738.transcript: Ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha.

1040306114.label: PL2400_vo_CMM_emo_pose_3
1040306114.transcript: Oh, yeah! I live for the fight!

1040852381.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_A
1040852381.transcript: Muahahaha! Relish the taste of combat!

1041569163.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
1041569163.transcript: Yep, it's laden with memories, good and bad. It drives me.

1042921853.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1700
1042921853.transcript: Well, I could go for another round.

1044923007.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0900
1044923007.transcript: Nothing keeps a warrior grounded like the taste of home. You're a good man.

1045098832.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
1045098832.transcript: A tempest worthy of a primeval god! Howl, beast!

1045447108.label: PL2400_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_1
1045447108.transcript: Snack time. Damn good. Rice for life, baby.

1048657634.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
1048657634.transcript: Good fight, but I never lose.

1048871603.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
1048871603.transcript: Ha ha ha ha! Face me in a duel if you want to see my true power!

1049110534.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
1049110534.transcript: Hey, why the hell is security so light back here?

1051884141.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
1051884141.transcript: If you can't handle the heat, then stay out of the inferno!

1065724764.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1000
1065724764.transcript: Feedback accepted. Next time I'll make it six zillion out of ten!

1067612675.label: PL2400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
1067612675.transcript: Oh, I admire your will to stare death in the face.

1069505693.label: PL2400_vo_DUO_rescue1_A_PL1900_2
1069505693.transcript: Come on, you got more fire than that.

1073476138.label: PL2400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_A
1073476138.transcript: Let me see the steel of your fangs, Silver Wolves!
